blocks.content: Learn how to safely recover from catastrophic AI hallucinations based on your deployment tier.

blocks.title: The Scenario
blocks.content: Let's say you told an agent in "Fast Mode" to clean up your directories, and it hallucinated, deleting your core system binaries. In a normal OS, you are in trouble.
Verify failure by running `python3 --version`. It will fail. **Don't panic.**

items.title: Tier 1 (Direct Install)
items.content: Rerun the setup script or winget command from Module 2.

items.title: Tier 3 (Container Sandbox)
items.content: Type `exit` to kill the container. Press the Up Arrow in your host terminal to re-run your `docker run` command. The broken state is deleted instantly, and a fresh container is spun up in seconds.

blocks.content: Notice your source code in `my-agent-app` remains completely safe regardless of tier because it is mapped to a persistent volume!
